answer: Yes, Mailchimp provides self-serve API access for all account tiers, including the Free plan [1]. You can generate an API key directly from your account settings once logged in [1][2]. Access is programmatic and allows you to manage audiences, sync data, and handle campaigns [1]. While the Marketing API is available to all users, note that Mailchimp Transactional API features typically require a Standard plan or higher [2]. Be aware that all API usage is subject to request limits and the specific permissions associated with your account's user role [1].
